languages.text: Этот мир не имеет недостатка в энергоносителях и способен обеспечить ими свои производства.

traits.locale_text: Этот мир не имеет недостатка в энергоносителях и способен обеспечить ими свои производства.
Этот мир не имеет недостатка в энергоносителях и способен обеспечить ими свои производства.

languages.text: This world has no shortage of energy and is capable of providing plenty of power to its own industry.
languages.original_text: Этот мир не имеет недостатка в энергоносителях и способен обеспечить ими свои производства.

traits.locale_text: This world has requires no outside sources of energy as it has plenty of its own.
This world has requires no outside sources of energy as it has plenty of its own.
This world has no shortage of energy and is capable of providing plenty of power to its own industry.

languages.text: Diese Welt hat keinen Energiemangel und ist in der Lage, ihre eigene Industrie mit ausreichend Energie zu versorgen.
languages.original_text: This world has no shortage of energy and is capable of providing plenty of power to its own industry.

traits.locale_text: Diese Welt hat keinen Energiemangel und ist in der Lage, ihre eigene Industrie mit ausreichend Energie zu versorgen.

languages.text: Ce monde ne manque pas d'énergie et est capable de fournir beaucoup d'énergie à sa propre industrie.
languages.original_text: This world has no shortage of energy and is capable of providing plenty of power to its own industry.

traits.locale_text: Ce monde ne manque pas d'énergie et est capable de fournir beaucoup d'énergie à sa propre industrie.

languages.text: Este mundo no tiene escasez de energía y es capaz de suministrar mucha energía a su propia industria.
languages.original_text: This world has no shortage of energy and is capable of providing plenty of power to its own industry.

traits.locale_text: Este mundo no tiene escasez de energía y es capaz de suministrar mucha energía a su propia industria.

languages.text: Bu dünyanın enerji sıkıntısı yoktur ve kendi sanayisine bol miktarda enerji sağlayabilecek kapasitededir.
languages.original_text: This world has no shortage of energy and is capable of providing plenty of power to its own industry.

traits.locale_text: Bu dünyanın enerji sıkıntısı yoktur ve kendi sanayisine bol miktarda enerji sağlayabilecek kapasitededir.
